raw_consumer_statement: Beginning in early XXXX XX/XX/XXXX I reported fraud to American Express . I was told that there were {$30000.00} in fraudulent charges on the card. I was then told there were {$12000.00} in fraudulent charges and then was sent a check in the amount of $ XXXX. Since then I have rented cars through XXXX XXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I was double charged by American Express for a rental dating back to XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX, XXXX in the amount of {$1800.00}. Between XX/XX/XXXX - XX/XX/XXXX I have paid {$6900.00} on my XXXX American Express card and {$2500.00} on my XXXX XXXX XXXX card. American Express is claiming that there {$3300.00} worth of new charges on my XXXX XXXX card - including another fraudulent charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX on XXXX XXXX for {$150.00}. The actual charges for the month of XXXX on my XXXX XXXX XXXX card total {$3200.00} and again I see no evidence that they are properly applying any payments I have made over the last 6 months since they stopped sending me actual bills and statements though I NEVER opted to go paperless. The bill I received from American Express XXXX states that I owe {$4000.00} though there are no new charges on the card and I have not used the card since XX/XX/XXXX. I have reported this to Office of Comptroller of Currency and am reporting the fraud here.
